noSignature.causative: させる is distinguishable, but the corpus items would need a role filter to be usable; out of scope for this pass.
noSignature.hou-ga-yori: Comparison frames span the clause; not a contiguous signature.
noSignature.koto-ni-suru: ことにする / ことになる differ by one verb lemma but overlap with the plain こと + に; out of scope for this pass.
noSignature.masen-ka: Negative-question ませんか needs a sentence-final test not yet written.
noSignature.nai-hou-ga-ii: ないほうがいい: the ない host test collides with ta-hou-ga-ii.
noSignature.ni-iku: に行く collides with the source/direction に; needs a motion-verb list.
noSignature.potential: Morphologically identical to `passive` — 彼は食べられる and 彼に食べられた tokenise the same. Cannot be labelled from the sentence.
noSignature.shi: Bare し. Collides with the 連用形 of する.
noSignature.shika-nai: しか〜ない spans arbitrary distance; not a contiguous signature.
noSignature.te-aru: てある vs ている overlap in the tagger's 有る/居る split more than is safe.
noSignature.te-iku: ていく's 行く collides with the ikenai signatures; needs disambiguation.
noSignature.te-mo: ても is a substring of てもいい and てもらう; needs negative lookahead.
noSignature.te-sequence: Bare て. Same token run as te-cause; they differ only by meaning, so labelling either would be labelling at random.
noSignature.to-conditional: Bare と. Collides with the quotative と and the listing と; the host test alone does not separate them.
noSignature.tokoro: Bare ところ (about to X) collides with ta-tokoro and the noun 所.
noSignature.wa-yori: See `hou-ga-yori`. And は is never quizzed regardless.
noSignature.wake-da: 〜わけだ ('that's why') is rare in Tatoeba and its 訳 token is shared by 言い訳だ ('it's an excuse'), the interrogative どういうわけだ, and the DIFFERENT patterns わけがない / わけではない / わけにはいかない. Only 10 raw matches, and the one that passed the filters was どういう訳だ — the wrong sense. No safe contiguous signature; needs hand-authored examples.
noSignature.you-to-omou: Volitional + と思う; folded into to-omou for this pass.
